codeReview.summary: Feature correctly implemented. All 'AI slop' patterns removed: linear-gradient backgrounds, border-l-[3px] accent stripes, and backdrop-blur-xl glassmorphism. Changes are minimal, focused, and consistent with design system goals.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No issues found with implementation. Worker followed expected patterns for design token updates in -admin-ui.ts

summary: PASS - The admin-design-system-consistency feature successfully removed all 'AI slop' patterns (gradients, border stripes of 3px, glassmorphism) from the admin design system. Changes were made to 3 files: -admin-ui.ts (surfaceGlass, navItemActive, navItemInactive, headerShell tokens), -AdminNavbar.tsx (Admin badge gradient removed), and -SidebarItem.tsx (border-l-[3px] removed). The implementation correctly addresses all expected behaviors: no gradient text, no border-left/right > 1px accent stripes, no glassmorphism, proper hover states preserved, and consistent solid backgrounds. Pre-existing TypeScript/lint errors in other files (login.tsx, index.tsx) are unrelated to this change.
